title: Malty Springy Slovakian Oat milk Pudding
description: A show-off dessert originating from Slovakia, highlighting the use of oat milk and a springy texture, with a deep malty flavor.

ingredients.name: Malt Syrup
ingredients.notes: Dark or light color syrup as preferred

instructions: In a medium saucepan, whisk together oat milk, sugar, cornstarch, salt, and malt syrup. Cook over medium heat, whisking until mixture comes to a boil.
Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes, or until pudding thickens and passes the "coat the back of a spoon" test.
In a small bowl, whisk together lemon juice and vanilla extract. Add to the pudding mixture and cook for another minute.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly, then transfer the pudding to ramekins or small glasses.
Cover the ramekins with plastic wrap, pressing the wrap directly onto the surface of the pudding to prevent a skin from forming.
Place ramekins in a steamer basket, pour the water around it, and steam for 15 minutes, or until the pudding is set and slightly firm.
Remove ramekins from the steamer and let cool completely on a wire rack.
Once set, top with elderberry jam if desired, and serve chilled.
Garnish with a few fresh berries if preferred.
